A.text: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.

C.text: t moves upward, away from the pad, without touching the trench.

D.text: It remains confined to a narrow column beneath the nozzle.

parsed.answer_value: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows the exhaust plume expanding and spreading along the trench immediately after ignition, indicating that it is moving away from the rocket.
